migrations.title: Tabby Model + Embedding Split
migrations.description: Separate completion model and embedding model configuration for better indexing quality.

steps.title: Model separation
steps.description: Split single model config into completion + embedding entries.
steps.after:
completionModel:
  id: qwen2.5-coder
  endpoint: http://localhost:8080
embeddingModel:
  id: bge-small
  endpoint: http://localhost:8081
steps.notes: Embedding model can stay lightweight while completion stays code-focused.
